message:
fix(release): use brews instead of homebrew_casks for formula publishing

The original PR used homebrew_casks: which generates Cask-format files,
but the existing tap (steveyegge/homebrew-beads) uses Formula-class format.
Switch to brews: which generates the correct formula format. Also add
skip_upload: auto so releases succeed even without HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN.

Co-authored-by: peterkc <peterkc@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -194,18 +194,19 @@ archives:
       - README.md
       - CHANGELOG.md
 
-homebrew_casks:
+brews:
   - name: bd
     repository:
       owner: steveyegge
       name: homebrew-beads
       token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}"
     directory: Formula
+    skip_upload: auto
     homepage: "https://github.com/steveyegge/beads"
     description: "AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows"
     license: "MIT"
-    binaries:
-      - bd
+    install: |
+      bin.install "bd"
 
 checksum:
   name_template: "checksums.txt"
